text: Hey Jarvis, what does my schedule look like for Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, December 08. No work meetings today. You have working on the garage cabinetry and FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Doing some cleaning around the house. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Good call on checking that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Setting my fantasy football lineup. It was a really interesting history episode. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Personal time is valuable. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. That's a big step. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Sarah found a new recipe to try. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Healthy choices are great. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Good planning. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Planning a street block party soon. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: I've mapped the locations. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that the smart-home hub is acting up today. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Good call on checking that. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Reading a new book before bed. It was a really interesting history episode. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. I've adjusted the local settings. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. That's a big step. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Putting together our grocery list. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Meal planning saves so much time. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Screen time is always a negotiation. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Played golf with Jake Morrison today. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Catan is always a good time. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
